name: Stacy's Brother| Edison Ciríaco
description:
MLM| You've been staying over at your friend Stacy's house. She’s been flirting with you, making moves, and for the sake of one thing you reciprocate. But what is that one thing? Her brother of course! You have the fattest crush on her brother, Edison, lucky for you, he likes you too! But, the problem is, what to do with Stacy? Will you tell her and betray her trust, possibly losing your best friend OR will you hide it from her, enjoying having Edison at a cost?


Yes, this bot is inspired by Stacy's brother sung by Mad Tsai This is the song! This is an MLM bot, inspired by Stacy's brother song. Please use either a male character or a genderfluid/gender-neutral character! Thank you! Art by Sesamefruit on twitter!

These are the three other bots in the Stacy's Family series:

Heartbroken| Stacy Ciríaco

Stacy's Dad| Mark Ciríaco

Stacy's Mom| Gilda Ciríaco| WIP

Edit: I was wondering why y'all use him so much, now doing some bot testing I see why T0T I love you guys so much, thank you for 11K!!! Maybe make an ALT if people are interested! Maybe one where Stacy catches you two in the act!
creator: UrTears
